body:
# REFERENCE: File Map вЂ” What Lives Where

**Date:** 2026-04-11 (R6: libclient package, .link line 2 volatile)
**Purpose:** Single source of truth for file locations. Any agent working on pippi-librarian or prd2wiki must reference this page to avoid editing the wrong files.

## Three Codebases, Three Locations

| Codebase | Source repo | Install location | Binary |
|----------|------------|-----------------|--------|
| **pippi-librarian** | `/srv/pippi-librarian/` | `/opt/pippi-librarian/` | `/opt/pippi-librarian/bin/pippi-librarian` |
| **prd2wiki** | `/srv/prd2wiki/` | `/srv/prd2wiki/` (same) | `/tmp/prd2wiki-fast` |
| **TEI embedder** | `/opt/tei/` (built from source) | `/opt/prd2wiki/bin/tei` | `/opt/prd2wiki/bin/tei` |

## DO NOT TOUCH

| Path | Why |
|------|-----|
| `/opt/pippi/` | Production Pippi on 192.168.23.171. Not this machine. |
| `/srv/pippi-librarian-source/` | Pinned tarball of original Pippi source. Archive only. |
| `/srv/pippi-librarian-staging/` | Old staging area. Not used. |
| `/tmp/pippi-librarian-test*-data/` | Test data dirs from stress testing. Disposable. |
| `/tmp/pippi-clean-data/` | Integration test data. Disposable. |

---

## Production Disk Layout (Target вЂ” per de836ff)

```
/srv/prd2wiki/
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ config/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ prd2wiki.yaml                       в†ђ server settings ONLY (no project list)
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tree/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .git/                                в†ђ tracks tree changes
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .access                              в†ђ global default access rules (proposed)
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ engineering/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ prd2wiki/
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .uuid                        в†ђ project identity
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .access                      в†ђ project-level access (proposed)
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ master-plan.link             в†ђ page pointer (line 2 = current mem_ ID, updated each edit)
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ architecture/
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ storage.link
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ embedder.link
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ record-model.link
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ...
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ svg-terminal/
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .uuid
в”‚   в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ overview.link
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ games/
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ battletech/
в”‚           в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .uuid
в”‚           в””в”Ђв”Ђ mechlab.link
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ data/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ repos/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ proj_660f9500.git/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ proj_770a8601.git/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ proj_880b9702.git/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ blobs/
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ab/cdef1234567890...
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ 9f/8e7d6c5b4a3928...
```

### Current Disk Layout (Before Migration)

```
/srv/prd2wiki/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ config/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ prd2wiki.yaml
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ data/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ default.wiki.git/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ svg-terminal.wiki.git/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ battletech.wiki.git/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ phat-toad-with-trails.wiki.git/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ index.db
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ index.db-shm
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ index.db-wal
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ vectors/
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ pages.json
```

### Migration Path

| Before | After | Action |
|--------|-------|--------|
| `data/default.wiki.git/` | `data/repos/proj_{uuid}.git/` | Rename, assign UUID |
| `data/index.db` | Gone | Tree replaces FTS for navigation |
| `data/vectors/pages.json` | Gone | Librarian provides search |
| (none) | `tree/` directory | Create tree with .uuid and .link files |
| (none) | `data/blobs/` | Extract binary attachments from git |

---

## pippi-librarian Source (`/srv/pippi-librarian/`)

All librarian code changes happen here. Build here, install to `/opt/pippi-librarian/`.

### Key files for schema + versioning

```
/srv/pippi-librarian/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ cmd/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ pippi-librarian/main.go              # MODIFY: load schemas, pass to stores
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ pippi-librarian-keygen/main.go       # NO CHANGE
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ pippi-librarian-schema/main.go       # NEW: schema validator CLI
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ internal/librarian/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ schema_ext.go                        # NEW: extension types
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ schema_loader.go                     # NEW: load + merge
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ schema_validate.go                   # NEW: add-only checks
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ memory.go                            # MODIFY: versioning, Store() returns (string, error)
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ memory_lance.go                      # MODIFY: ext_json, version columns, record_type
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ table.go                             # MODIFY: EmbeddingText() + filters
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ librarian.go                         # MODIFY: tool handlers, deep search
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ registrar.go                         # MODIFY: tool schema merge
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ compactor.go                         # MODIFY: skip superseded
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ entities.go                          # MODIFY: mem_ IDs, store to memory table
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ entity_lance.go                      # DELETE
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ entity_lance_stub.go                 # DELETE
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ *.go.bak                             # IGNORE: dead SQLite code
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ schema.d/wiki.yaml                       # NEW: wiki extension schema
в””в”Ђв”Ђ lib/linux_amd64/                         # LanceDB native libs
```

### Build + test

```bash
cd /srv/pippi-librarian
CGO_ENABLED=1 CGO_LDFLAGS="-L/srv/pippi-librarian/lib/linux_amd64 -llancedb_go" go build -o /opt/pippi-librarian/bin/pippi-librarian ./cmd/pippi-librarian/
LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/srv/pippi-librarian/lib/linux_amd64 go test ./internal/librarian/ -race -count=1
```

---

## prd2wiki Source (`/srv/prd2wiki/`)

### Key files for tree migration + wiki integration

```
/srv/prd2wiki/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ cmd/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ prd2wiki/main.go                     # MODIFY: tree scanner, remove project list
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ prd2wiki-export/main.go              # NEW
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ prd2wiki-import/main.go              # NEW
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ prd2wiki-verify/main.go              # NEW
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ prd2wiki-chain/main.go               # EXISTING
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ internal/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tree/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ scanner.go                       # NEW: scan tree/ for .uuid and .link
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ project.go                       # NEW: Project type
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ page.go                          # NEW: Page type
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ redirect.go                      # NEW: .301/.302 resolution
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ libclient/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ client.go                        # NEW: remote librarian client (HTTP/socket)
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ git/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ repo.go                          # MODIFY: WritePage returns (string, error)
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ page.go                          # MODIFY: returns (string, error)
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ api/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ pages.go                         # MODIFY: tree-based routing
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ server.go                        # MODIFY: accept libclient + tree scanner
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ respond.go                       # NEW: writeJSON helper
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ redirect.go                      # NEW: .301/.302 HTTP redirects
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ web/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ handler.go                       # MODIFY: sidebar from .link line 3
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ editcache.go                     # MODIFY: add CreatedAt
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ list.go                          # MODIFY: page list from tree scan
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ transfer/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ export.go                        # NEW
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ import.go                        # NEW
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ manifest.go                      # NEW
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ verify.go                        # NEW
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ librarian/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ librarian.go                     # MODIFY: syncToLibrarian, .link line 2 write-back
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ app/app.go                           # MODIFY: create tree scanner + libclient
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ index/indexer.go                     # DEPRECATE: replaced by tree + librarian
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ pagepath/resolve.go                  # NEW: shared page path resolution
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ config/prd2wiki.yaml                     # MODIFY: tree.dir, data.dir, librarian endpoint
```

**Package note:** The remote librarian client is at `internal/libclient/`, NOT `internal/librarian/`. The existing `internal/librarian/` package is the wiki's page submission/orchestration logic. Separate packages prevent confusion and circular deps.

### Config format (target)

```yaml
server:
  addr: "0.0.0.0:8082"
data:
  dir: "./data"
tree:
  dir: "./tree"
librarian:
  socket: "/var/run/pippi-librarian.sock"
logging:
  level: "info"
```

### Build

```bash
cd /srv/prd2wiki && go build -o /tmp/prd2wiki-fast ./cmd/prd2wiki/
```

---

## Production Install (`/opt/pippi-librarian/`)

```
/opt/pippi-librarian/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ bin/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ pippi-librarian                      # Server (28MB)
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ pippi-librarian-keygen               # Key issuer (24MB)
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ pippi-librarian-schema               # Schema validator (NEW)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ configs/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ pippi-librarian.yaml
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ schema.d/wiki.yaml                   # NEW
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ data/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ kv.badger/                           # BadgerDB (metadata)
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ pippi_memory.lance/                  # LanceDB (ALL records + vectors)
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ import_checkpoint.json               # NEW
в””в”Ђв”Ђ lib/linux_amd64/                         # LanceDB native libs
```

---

## TEI Embedder (`/opt/prd2wiki/`)

```
/opt/prd2wiki/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ bin/tei                                  # 53MB, port 8088
в””в”Ђв”Ђ models/nomic-embed-text-v1.5-hf/        # ONNX model + tokenizer
```

---

## Running Services

| Service | Socket / Port | Config |
|---------|--------------|--------|
| pippi-librarian | `/var/run/pippi-librarian.sock`, `127.0.0.1:9090` | `/opt/pippi-librarian/configs/pippi-librarian.yaml` |
| TEI embedder | `127.0.0.1:8088` | CLI args |
| prd2wiki | `0.0.0.0:8082` | `/srv/prd2wiki/config/prd2wiki.yaml` |

---

## Dot-Files in the Tree

| File | Where | Format |
|------|-------|--------|
| `.uuid` | Project root | Line 1: UUID, Line 2: display name |
| `{name}.link` | Any dir | Line 1: page UUID, Line 2: current `mem_` ID (updated each edit), Line 3: title |
| `.access` | Any dir | `read:` / `write:` rules (proposed) |
| `.301` | Old location | Target path (permanent redirect) |
| `.302` | Old location | Target path (temporary redirect) |

**`.link` line 2 is volatile.** Under new-chain-forward versioning, the head `mem_` ID changes on every edit. The wiki updates `.link` line 2 after each successful `syncToLibrarian`. `page_uuid` (line 1) is the stable identifier.

---

## Rules for Agents

1. **Source code** in `/srv/`. **Never edit** `/opt/`.
2. **Build in source, install to opt.**
3. **`.go.bak` = dead code.** Ignore.
4. **`LD_LIBRARY_PATH`** for LanceDB tests.
5. **SIGTERM** to stop pippi-librarian. Not `kill -9`.
6. **Service keys** issued before server starts.
7. **Tree is source of truth.** Projects from `.uuid`, pages from `.link`. Not config.
8. **`page_uuid` never changes.** `mem_` head ID changes every edit. Use `page_uuid` for lookups.
9. **One LanceDB table** (`pippi_memory`). All `mem_` IDs. `record_type` column.
10. **Remote librarian client** at `internal/libclient/`, NOT `internal/librarian/`.
title: REFERENCE: File Map вЂ” What Lives Where
